series_metadata.series_title: Disapproved Clean Ohio Trails Fund and Federal Recreational Trail Program
series_metadata.series_description: These are grant applications for the Clean Ohio Trails Fund (COTF)and Federal Recreational Trails Program(RTP) that were not approved for grant funding. Both the COTF and RTP can be used to improve new and existing recreational trail systems in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years from the time the grants were not approved, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
